hook.summary: Rapid-fire block placement clearing a green grid.
hook.visual_action: Blocks are snapped into place at high speed, filling a grid while a progress bar moves from 'SMART' to 'GENIUS'.

scene_flow: High-speed gameplay showing a green grid being filled with blocks to reach 'GENIUS' status.
Grid completion triggers an 'All Clear!' message with celebratory fireworks and sound effects.
Transition to a new level featuring yellow blocks and a score of 5000.
Final end card displaying the game logo, developer name, and app store download links.
audience_proxy: Casual puzzle enthusiasts who enjoy satisfying, fast-paced spatial reasoning games.
